utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (given), travel_dates (given), transportation (only airline/class/round trip stated; no flight details like times or costs → not fully specified), accommodation (only type and nights; no hotel selection name or costs → not fully specified), activities (listed but no costs → not fully specified), additional_services (email inquiry sent; acceptable as extra service, but no costs; still fits 'any extra services' though costs were requested—costs missing → not fully specified), total_budget (a single number €760; but no complete cost breakdown → not fully specified). Fully specified according to the format’s requirement for details and costs: destination and travel_dates only. So 2 fully specified out of 7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes: destination Lisbon, Portugal; transportation via Budget Airlines, Economy Class; accommodation Eco Lodge; activities City Walking Tour, Cooking Class, and Kayaking. From the ground-truth, Lisbon, Portugal has a rating of 6. Budget Airlines Economy Class corresponds to transportation.budget_airlines.Economy Class with rating 10. Eco Lodge has rating 10. City Walking Tour has rating 9. The package lists 'Cooking Class' which does not exactly match any ground-truth activity name; the closest in the ground-truth is 'Vegan Cooking Class' with rating 8, so we map to that named item. Kayaking has rating 7. No other listed items in the package (like additional services email or total budget) correspond to rated items.
